name: Black Berry Preserves
recipeInstructions:
1. Mash the blackberries with a potato masher.
2. Measure the berry pulp and add one pint of sugar per pint of pulp.
3. Bring the mixture to a full boil and cook for 30 minutes.
4. Skim the mixture while it is boiling to ensure proper sealing.
5. Ladle the preserves into sterilized jars.
6. Melt paraffin carefully, removing all bubbles with a sterilized spoon.
7. Pour the melted paraffin until it is about 1/4 inch thick on top of each jar of preserves.
8. Allow the preserves to stand and harden.
